project.name: iD Tagging Schema
project.description: Presets available in the iD editor, Rapid, StreetComplete, Go Map!!, Every Door, and other applications The following mnemonics are used in individual tag descriptions to annotate in which context the respective tag is supported: 🄿: preset, 🄵 field, 🄵🅅: field value, 🄳: deprecated tag, 🄳🄳: discarded tag

tags.description: 🄿 LGBTQ+ Erotic Store, 🄿 LGBTQ+ Pub, 🄿 LGBTQ+ Nightclub, 🄿 LGBTQ+ Community Center, 🄿 LGBTQ+ Bar
🄿 Secondhand Clothing Store, 🄿 Used Car Dealership

🄿 Subway Stopping Location, 🄿 Subway Station, 🄿 Subway Platform, 🄿 Subway Stop / Platform (unsearchable)

🄿 Cycle & Foot Path, 🄿 Cycle & Foot Crossing, 🄵🅅 Foot access: `designated`, 🄵🅅 Allowed Access: `designated`

🄿 Nursing Home, 🄿 Elderly Group Home, 🄿 Senior Assisted Living Facility
🄵 Wheelchair Turning Cycle, 🄵 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position
🄵🅅 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position: Up only
🄵🅅 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position: Down only
🄵🅅 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position: Up and down
🄵🅅 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position: Inside only
🄵🅅 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position: Outside only
🄵🅅 Wheelchair Turning Cycle Position: Inside and outside
🄵🅅 Trail Visibility: Excellent: unambiguous path or markers everywhere
🄵🅅 Trail Visibility: Good: markers visible, sometimes require searching
🄵🅅 Trail Visibility: Intermediate: few markers, path mostly visible
🄵🅅 Trail Visibility: Bad: no markers, path sometimes invisible/pathless
🄵🅅 Trail Visibility: Horrible: often pathless, some orientation skills required
🄵🅅 Trail Visibility: No: pathless, excellent orientation skills required
🄵🅅 Walking stick detectable warning: Kerb on floor, behind obstacle (at least 3cm)
🄵🅅 Walking stick detectable warning: Pole on floor, at 40cm max
🄵🅅 Walking stick detectable warning: Other tactile warning
🄵🅅 Walking stick detectable warning: No tactile warning
🄵🅅 Smoothness: Excellent, 🄵🅅 Smoothness: Thin Rollers: rollerblade, skateboard
🄵🅅 Smoothness: Good, 🄵🅅 Smoothness: Thin Wheels: racing bike
🄵🅅 Smoothness: Intermediate, 🄵🅅 Smoothness: Wheels: city bike, wheelchair, scooter
🄵🅅 Smoothness: Bad / uncomfortable, 🄵🅅 Smoothness: Robust Wheels: trekking bike, car, rickshaw
🄵🅅 Smoothness: Very bad, 🄵🅅 Smoothness: High Clearance: light duty off-road vehicle
🄵🅅 Smoothness: Horrible, 🄵🅅 Smoothness: Off-Road: heavy duty off-road vehicle
🄵🅅 Hiking Difficulty: T3: Demanding Mountain Hiking
🄵🅅 Hiking Difficulty: T5: Demanding Alpine Hiking
🄵🅅 Hiking Difficulty: T6: Difficult Alpine Hiking
🄵 Stop Number, 🄵 Platform Number, 🄵 Reference Code
🄵🅅 Accepts: Any Glass (tempered glass, windows, mirrors, etc.)
🄵 Is an obstacle for wheelchair users ?
🄵 Is an obstacle for blind people ?
🄵🅅 Horseback Riding Difficulty: Easy: No problems or difficulties. (default)
🄵🅅 Horseback Riding Difficulty: Use with caution: Uneven way, occasional difficult passages.
🄵🅅 Horseback Riding Difficulty: Difficult: Way narrow and exposed. May contain obstacles to step over and narrow passages.
🄵🅅 Horseback Riding Difficulty: Borderline: Passable only for experienced riders and horses. Major obstacles. Bridges should be examined carefully.
🄵🅅 Horseback Riding Difficulty: Dangerous: Passable only for very experienced riders and horses and only in good weather. Dismount.
🄵🅅 Horseback Riding Difficulty: Impassable: Way or bridge not passable for horses. Too narrow, insufficient support, obstacles like ladders. Danger of life.
🄵🅅 Handrail: Only one handrail, on the center of the stairs
🄵🅅 Allowed Access: Customers Only, 🄵🅅 Allowed Access: `customers`
🄵🅅 Allowed Access: By Permit Only, 🄵🅅 Allowed Access: `permit`
🄵🅅 Orientation: Diagonal in Relation to the Street (~45°)
🄵🅅 Orientation: Meets the Street at a Straight Angle (~90°)
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 0: Solid gravel/packed earth, no obstacles, wide curves
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 1: Some loose surface, small obstacles, wide curves
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 2: Much loose surface, large obstacles, easy hairpins
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 3: Slippery surface, large obstacles, tight hairpins
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 4: Loose surface or boulders, dangerous hairpins
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 5: Maximum difficulty, boulder fields, landslides
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Difficulty: 6: Not rideable except by the very best mountain bikers
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Uphill Difficulty: 0: Avg. incline <10%, gravel/packed earth, no obstacles
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Uphill Difficulty: 1: Avg. incline <15%, gravel/packed earth, few small objects
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Uphill Difficulty: 2: Avg. incline <20%, stable surface, fistsize rocks/roots
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Uphill Difficulty: 3: Avg. incline <25%, variable surface, fistsize rocks/branches
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Uphill Difficulty: 4: Avg. incline <30%, poor condition, big rocks/branches
🄵🅅 Mountain Biking Uphill Difficulty: 5: Very steep, bike generally needs to be pushed or carried
🄵🅅 IMBA Trail Difficulty: ◆◆ Extremely Difficult (double black diamond)
🄵🅅 Visibility Obstacle at kerb: car parking space
🄵🅅 Visibility Obstacle at kerb: waste disposal
🄵🅅 Visibility Obstacle at kerb: recycling disposal
🄵🅅 Crossing Markings: Ladder With Longitudinal Bars
🄵🅅 Crossing Markings: Ladder With Diagonal Bars
🄵🅅 Crossing Markings: Longitudinal Bars With Alternating Colors
🄵🅅 Crossing Markings: Ladder With Paired Longitudinal Bars
